Feature_Name: Inter-gNB-DU LTM Handover UE Context Setup
Feature_Description: This procedure is used for the case when the UE moves from one gNB-DU to another gNB-DU within the same gNB-CU during NR operation for LTM (LTM: Low-latency Target Mobility).
Feature_Objectives: To enable the gNB-CU to prepare and send the F1AP 'UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST' message to a candidate gNB-DU for Inter-gNB-DU LTM handover.
To allow the candidate gNB-DU to respond with the F1AP 'UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE' message, indicating acceptance of the LTM configuration.
To establish a UE context and set up one or more data bearers in the candidate gNB-DU for the LTM procedure.
To configure CSI resources and provide LTM configuration ID mapping list for subsequent LTM operations.
Procedure_Implementation_Steps: 1. The gNB-CU determines to initiate LTM configuration based on L3 measurement reports (from Section 8.2.1.5, step 2).
2. The gNB-CU sends a UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message to the candidate gNB-DU(s) for each candidate cell to create a UE context and setup one or more data bearers (from Section 8.2.1.5, step 3).
3. The UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message contains one candidate cell ID and the CSI resource configuration for subsequent LTM (from Section 8.2.1.5, step 3).
4. The gNB-CU may provide the LTM configuration ID mapping list to the candidate gNB-DU(s) within the UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message (from Section 8.2.1.5, step 3).
5. The gNB-CU may request PRACH resources from the candidate gNB-DU(s) within the UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message (from Section 8.2.1.5, step 3).

6. The gNB-CU may request the candidate gNB-DU(s) to provide the lower layer configuration for the purpose of generating the reference configuration or provide the lower layer part of the reference configuration to the candidate gNB-DU(s) within the UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message (from Section 8.2.1.5, step 3).
7. If the candidate gNB-DU accepts the request of LTM configuration, it responds with a UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message to the gNB-CU (from Section 8.2.1.5, step 4).
8. The UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message includes the generated lower layer RRC configurations for the accepted target candidate cell (from Section 8.2.1.5, step 4).
Piggy_Backed_IES_Info: The UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message may include the lower layer part of the reference configuration, which is RRC-related. The UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message includes the generated lower layer RRC configurations for the accepted target candidate cell.

Piggy_Backed_IES_Mapping.Piggy_Backed_IE_Name: Lower layer part of the reference configuration
